mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `bank`.`savings_schedule` ( account_id, due_date, installment_amount, status ) VALUES
(#{schedule.accountId}, #{schedule.dueDate}, #{schedule.installmentAmount}, #{schedule.status})
mapper.select: SELECT schedule_id AS scheduleId, account_id AS accountId, due_date AS dueDate, installment_amount AS installmentAmount, status FROM `bank`.`savings_schedule` WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY due_date ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE `bank`.`savings_schedule` SET status = #{status}, paid_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN NOW() ELSE paid_at END WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
mapper.select: SELECT ss.schedule_id AS scheduleId, ss.account_id AS accountId, sa.linked_account_id AS linkedAccountId, ss.installment_amount AS installmentAmount, ss.due_date AS dueDate FROM `bank`.`savings_schedule` ss JOIN `bank`.`savings_account` sa ON ss.account_id = sa.account_id WHERE ss.status = 'PENDING' AND ss.due_date <= #{currentDate} ORDER BY ss.due_date ASC
